title: senecio scalaris var. parrasianus
intro: Senecio scalaris var. parrasianus, also known as Parras Ragwort, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae, native to Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant's health benefits include relief from arthritis, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Parras Ragwort is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
